generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former intelligence analyst, I've seen firsthand how strategic autonomy keeps us safe. When we rely too much on others for defense, we become vulnerable. Look at how our allies hesitated during the 2024 crisis - we need to stand on our own feet. Trust me, this isn't about isolation; it's about smart, independent security. #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
